title: Sheep Girl
description: Changes the appearance of sheeps into that of cute sheep girls.
body:
This texture pack transforms Minecraft’s sheep into cute sheep girls, giving the mob an adorable humanoid look while keeping their original behavior.
The pack includes all wool colors, each with its own matching sheep girl variant. Perfect for decorating farms, villages, or aesthetic builds with more personality and charm.

This texture pack requires Optifine to work properly.
If you use Fabric or Quilt, the pack needs the ETF (Entity Texture Features) and EMF (Entity Model Features) mods to function correctly.
It works on Minecraft versions higher and lower than 1.21.
